content:
Strengthening the Operational Foundation

Aoura Group's board of directors has approved a capital allocation plan totaling $25 million to strengthen business infrastructure and accelerate procurement technology deployment. This investment cycle highlights our dedication to maintaining a highly modern B2B supply ecosystem in the region.

Breakdown of Capital Deployment

The approved funding will be distributed across three strategic pillars:

  • Fleet Expansion and Logistics (40%): Acquiring medium-duty delivery vehicles to increase the daily delivery capacity of Aoura Products by 65%.
  • Warehouse Automation and Tech (35%): Integrating advanced inventory tracking systems to minimize shipment discrepancies and speed up order processing.
  • Proprietary Procurement Portal (25%): Developing a digital wholesale portal that allows B2B clients to manage recurring orders and track logistics in real-time.
"Our disciplined capital allocation focuses on high-yield, long-term operational improvements that directly translate to faster, more reliable supply chains for our business partners."

Expected Operational Milestones

The roll-out of the new fleet is scheduled to complete by Q4 2026, while the initial beta phase of the proprietary B2B portal is expected to launch for corporate pilot accounts in early October.
